epa_per_play_z.what: Average EPA allowed per defensive play — lower = better
epa_per_play_z.how: Inverted so positive z = fewer points allowed.
epa_per_play_z.limits: Talent-dependent. Scheme matters but so do players.

pass_epa_per_play_z.what: EPA allowed per pass — lower = better
pass_epa_per_play_z.limits: CB/S talent is a major factor.

rush_epa_per_play_z.what: EPA allowed per rush — lower = better

third_down_rate_z.what: 3rd down conversion rate allowed — lower = better

red_zone_td_rate_z.what: Red zone TDs allowed — fewer = better

def_cap_pct_z.what: Total salary cap % allocated to defensive players
def_cap_pct_z.how: Sum of APY cap % for all defensive contracts active that season.
def_cap_pct_z.limits: Uses APY as proxy for actual cap hit. Doesn't capture restructures or dead money.

def_draft_capital_z.what: Draft capital invested in defensive players (Jimmy Johnson value chart)
def_draft_capital_z.how: Sum of draft pick values for defensive picks made that season.
def_draft_capital_z.limits: Only counts picks made, not trades or UDFA signings. Single-year snapshot.
